news.headline: Akari Therapeutics appoints Abizer Gaslightwala as President and CEO. Former Jazz Pharmaceuticals SVP with $1B annual sales.
news.summary: A former Senior Vice President and Franchise Head at Jazz Pharmaceuticals, known for successfully overseeing a product portfolio covering solid and hematological malignancies with a combined yearly revenue of $1 billion.

news.headline: VCI Global launches V Gallant CyberSecure: AI-powered defense with military-grade encryption chips, providing enterprise-grade protection against cyber threats like ransomware and malware with fully encrypted, automated system backups.
news.summary: Ensure robust protection against ransomware, malware, and cyber threats with enterprise-level security solutions. These include fully encrypted, automated system backups to safeguard critical data. This comprehensive defense strategy aims to prevent data breaches and cyberattacks, providing peace of mind for businesses. The advanced protection measures offer strong security features, such as encryption protocols and automated backup processes. By implementing these measures, companies can significantly reduce the risk of data loss and financial losses due to cyber incidents. Protect your systems with cutting-edge security technologies to stay resilient against evolving cyber threats.

news.headline: Finance of America (FOA) appoints Andrew Essex and Cory Gardner to Board of Directors bringing marketing & public policy expertise to strengthen leadership as they expand impact on senior homeowners.
news.summary: A Texas-based company, Finance of America Companies Inc. (FOA), known for providing home equity-based financing solutions for retirement, has appointed Andrew Essex and ex U.S. Senator Cory Gardner to its Board of Directors. With the recent additions, the board gains vast experience in marketing, public policy, and strategic growth. This move aims to enhance the company's leadership team as they aim to broaden their influence in assisting senior homeowners. FOA is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol FOA.

news.headline: Cizzle Brands secures 5-year title sponsorship for CWENCH All Canadian Basketball Games, promoting CWENCH Hydration in athletics. (Characters: 136)
news.summary: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has revealed that CWENCH Hydration™, its primary brand, is increasing visibility in Canadian athletics. The brand has secured a five-year title sponsorship deal for the CWENCH All Canadian Basketball Games, an NBA-sanctioned event for Canadian senior high school basketball players. The event spans three days, starting on Friday, April 4, 2025, and continuing through the weekend.

news.headline: nRichDX to showcase new products at AACR Annual Meeting 2025, including Revolution Plus Instrument, at booth #4641 in Chicago.
news.summary: nRichDX, a prominent player in liquid biopsy sample preparation, is set to unveil its latest innovation, the Revolution Plus Instrument, along with new kits and data at booth #4641 during an upcoming conference in Chicago on March 20, 2025. The company, recognized for its revolutionary Revolution Sample Prep System, will showcase these new offerings at the event.

news.headline: Green Hydrogen Int. Corp. becomes Energy Abundance Development Corp, focusing on behind-the-meter energy solutions.Characters: 106
news.summary: Houston-based Energy Abundance Development Corporation, formerly known as Green Hydrogen International Corp., a key player in large-scale green hydrogen production and storage projects, revealed their new branding on March 20, 2025. The company is recognized for its work in behind-the-meter projects. The rebranding comes into effect immediately.

news.headline: Six Albany ENT & Allergy Services physicians named 2025 Castle Connolly Top Docs in Albany, NY.
news.summary: Albany ENT and Allergy Services (AENT) announced the selection of six exceptional doctors for their outstanding contributions in the medical field. Dr. Gavin Setzen, Dr. Siobhan Kuhar, Dr. Lawrence Kaufman, Dr. Nora Perkins, Dr. Robert Adelson, and Dr. Jessica Riccio were recognized as the top specialists and sub-specialists for 2025. This announcement was made in Albany, New York on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Spring Break at KidZania Dallas: Kids explore diverse roles and realities, enhancing learning experiences.
news.summary: In Frisco, Texas, on March 20, 2025, KidZania Dallas is set as the top spot for kids this Spring Break. It offers a unique experience for children to engage in immersive learning opportunities. Kids can try out various new roles and immerse themselves in real-life situations. With [important numbers] activities and scenarios available, KidZania Dallas promises an unforgettable Spring Break experience for children seeking fun and educational adventures.

news.headline: ADS-TEC Energy to showcase ultra-fast EV charging platform, ChargeBox, with 320kW power at EV Charging Summit, saving operators 65% on peak usage.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, ADS-TEC Energy (NASDAQ: ADSE) will showcase its EV charging platform, ChargeBox, at booth 733 during the EV Charging Summit & Expo on March 26-27, 2025, held at the Westgate Resort Hotel. The innovative ChargeBox can deliver up to 320kW charging power, allowing vehicles to be charged within minutes. This battery-buffered technology offers flexibility and can save operators up to 65% on peak energy costs.

news.headline: Netography partners with Wiz to enhance WIN platform for better security against malicious activity targeting assets.
news.summary: In Annapolis, Maryland, Netography, a holistic network security and observability company, has announced an enhanced partnership with cloud security provider Wiz and its Wiz Integrations (WIN) platform. Through this collaboration, Netography will boost WIN by broadening the range of data it can ingest from the Wiz platform using the Netography Fusion® platform. This development allows customers to smoothly integrate more Wiz insights into their current detection and response workflows within Fusion. The partnership aims to provide improved security capabilities for users leveraging the combined strengths of Netography and Wiz.

news.headline: Dyadic gets funding from CEPI to use C1 for protein-based vaccine development. GLOBE NEWSWIRE, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Jupiter, Florida, March 20, 2025 - Dyadic International, Inc., a biotechnology firm (NASDAQ: DYAI), has disclosed receiving a funding award from CEPI to advance the development of protein-based vaccines using C1. The company specializes in the efficient production of proteins for various applications, including human and animal vaccines, therapeutics, as well as non-pharmaceutical sectors like food, nutrition, and wellness. This funding signals a significant step towards enhancing vaccine development technology.

news.headline: NANO Nuclear Energy hires two senior nuclear engineers to advance microreactor development. Talent acquisition drives progress.
news.summary: NANO Nuclear is consistently attracting high-caliber talent to drive the advancement of its groundbreaking microreactor technologies. The company is rapidly expanding its team with top-tier professionals to accelerate the development process. This strategic initiative has enabled NANO Nuclear to assemble a skilled workforce capable of fostering innovation and achieving significant milestones. This influx of talent has bolstered the company's capabilities in research, design, and implementation. As a result, NANO Nuclear is making remarkable progress in the development of its microreactor technologies, increasing its competitive edge in the market.

news.headline: ZenaTech signs 7th LOI to acquire land survey company in Southeast Region; aims to boost AI drone business.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a technology company specializing in AI drone, Drone as a Service (DaaS), enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions, has announced the signing of a Letter of Intent to acquire a seventh land survey engineering company in Florida. This marks the fourth LOI in the Southeast region, with one acquisition already closed in the same area. The acquisition is positioned to be the second closed deal in the Southeast Region upon completion. By establishing two locations in this region, ZenaTech aims to bolster regional development and expand its national DaaS business model. This move will enable the company to offer the speed and precision of AI drone solutions through a convenient subscription or pay-per-use model to a wide range of commercial and government customers. The company is listed on Nasdaq (ZENA), FSE (49Q), and BMV (ZENA).

news.headline: Autonomix Medical, Inc. obtains U.S. patent for data collection & processing tech via catheter, bolstering its portfolio to 80+ patents & 40 pending.
news.summary: The company has made significant strides in expanding its worldwide collection of patents, with over 80 patents currently issued and an additional 40 patent applications pending approval.

news.headline: POET ships samples of advanced optical engines to 3 global tech customers for AI applications.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, POET Technologies Inc. declared that it has successfully met sample orders from three worldwide clients for its advanced optical transmit engines. POET, a key player in developing and applying highly-integrated optical engines and light sources for AI networks, operates under the tickers PTK on TSX Venture and POET on NASDAQ.

news.headline: Callinex Mines submits Advanced Exploration Permit for high-grade copper Rainbow deposit in Flin Flon Mining District, MB. TSXV: CNX, OTCQX: CLLXF.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Callinex Mines Inc. has recently submitted an application for an Advanced Exploration Permit (AEP) to the Province of Manitoba for the Rainbow deposit. The company, also known by its stock symbols TSXV: CNX and OTCQX: CLLXF, is excited to move forward with this development. The submission marks a significant milestone for Callinex as it strives to further its operations in the mining sector. This application showcases the company's intention to expand its exploration activities.

news.headline: Volition introduces Nu.Q® Cancer Blood Test for lung cancer, aiming to transform $4 billion market.
news.summary: The article "A Promising Future for Lung Cancer" showcases the potential impact of the Nu.Q® Cancer Test on revolutionizing the $4 billion lung cancer market. VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX) is at the forefront of this innovation, aiming to enhance the diagnosis, treatment, and monitoring of lung cancer. This advancement brings hope for significant improvements in the field, offering a brighter outlook for patients and professionals alike.

news.headline: Agnico Eagle to invest in Cartier Resources: 20,770,000 units.
news.summary: A mining company, Agnico Eagle Mines Limited, trading as AEM on both the NYSE and TSX, revealed on March 20, 2025, that it will invest in Cartier Resources Inc. by purchasing 20,770,000 units. This transaction is part of a non-brokered private agreement between the two companies.

news.headline: Mike Regan appointed as head of Investor Relations and Data Science at Safe Harbor Financial, bringing experience in Investment Analysis and Product Innovation to advance cannabis sector solutions.
news.summary: An industry professional with a wealth of experience in investment analysis and product innovation has joined the team to spearhead growth initiatives and enhance solutions within the cannabis sector. The individual's expertise will significantly contribute to furthering developments in this sector.

news.headline: VERB hosting earnings call on March 25, 2025, 1:00 p.m. ET to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 results, CEO Rory J. Cutaia to lead call.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Verb Technology Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERB) based in Las Vegas and Los Alamitos, Calif., revealed plans for a conference call to be hosted by VERB CEO Rory J. Cutaia. The call, scheduled for March 25, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern time (10:00 a.m. Pacific time), is set to discuss the Company's financial performance for the fourth quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. The call will be accompanied by the release of financial results through a press release before the call. VERB is the force behind various platforms like MARKET.live, a livestream social shopping platform, telehealth platforms like VANITYPrescribed.com and GoodGirlRx.com, and the disruptive crowdfunding TV show GO FUND YOURSELF.show.

news.headline: IceCure collaborating with FDA for ProSense® Cryoablation in early-stage breast cancer; key updates expected.
news.summary: IceCure Medical Ltd., based in Caesarea, Israel, has been collaborating closely with the FDA to obtain a De Novo decision. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ICCM, specializes in developing minimally-invasive cryoablation technology. This innovative approach effectively eradicates tumors by subjecting them to extreme cold temperatures. This partnership with the FDA represents a significant step forward for IceCure Medical, indicating progress in gaining regulatory approval for its groundbreaking medical technology. The collaboration underscores the company's commitment to advancing cancer treatment methods.

news.headline: Circular Protocol, Arculus, and IT Lab collaborate to introduce a blockchain-compliant ecosystem for healthcare providers, offering secure verification and authentication of medical records.
news.summary: The Circular blockchain technology has introduced a groundbreaking infrastructure for establishing the inaugural digital network dedicated to verifying and authenticating medical records and transactions on-chain. This innovative system aims to revolutionize the way medical data is securely managed and accessed, with a primary focus on enhancing transparency and efficiency in healthcare processes. By incorporating blockchain technology, the platform ensures the validity and security of medical information, safeguarding the privacy of individuals while streamlining operations. The initiative marks a significant milestone in the healthcare sector, offering a reliable solution for on-chain verification and authentication of medical records and transactions, ultimately benefiting stakeholders by providing a secure and accessible digital ecosystem.

news.headline: Hyperlink InfoSystem named top NYC app dev company for 2025 as US mobile app market set to exceed $200 billion.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, it was reported that the United States is a key hub for technological advancements, particularly in the field of mobile app development. Recent studies indicate that the mobile app industry in the USA is projected to exceed an impressive $200 billion. This growth signifies a significant milestone in the country's tech landscape, solidifying its position as a leader in innovation.

news.headline: Data Storage Corporation (Nasdaq: DTST) will attend iAccess Alpha Virtual Conference on March 25-26, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Data Storage Corporation (Nasdaq: DTST), a key player in multi-cloud hosting, managed cloud services, disaster recovery, cybersecurity, and IT automation, shared plans to join the iAccess Alpha Virtual Best Ideas Spring Investment Conference on March 25-26, 2025. DSC integrates with major cloud providers like AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud. This move is significant for the company as it positions them in a prominent investment-focused event.

news.headline: IAB Tech Lab launches Trusted Server, an open-source solution for publishers to regain control amid browser lockdowns.
news.summary: Today in New York, the IAB Tech Lab, a leading global organization for digital advertising standards, introduced Trusted Server. This innovative open-source server-side ad management framework empowers publishers by providing them with full authority over ad monetization during an era of evolving practices. The launch signifies a significant step forward in the digital advertising industry, allowing publishers to enhance their control and decision-making.

news.headline: High Wire Networks (OTCQB: HWNI) seals a new bundled services contract with MSP partner, affirming the success of its cybersecurity strategy.
news.summary: Batavia, Illinois - On March 20, 2025, High Wire Networks, Inc. (OTCQB: HWNI) announced the completion of a new agreement for bundled services with a managed services provider (MSP). This contract signifies the increasing support for High Wire Networks' holistic cybersecurity strategy.

news.headline: Yara Board member Tina Lawton buys 840 shares, now owns total of 840 in Yara International ASA.
news.summary: Tina Lawton, a member of the Yara Board of Directors, has acquired 840 shares of Yara. This acquisition brings Lawton's total ownership in Yara International ASA to 840 shares. Additional information regarding the transaction is available in the attached document.

news.headline: Neurocrine Biosciences presents 48-week remission data on INGREZZA for tardive dyskinesia. Majority reached remission threshold. from PRNewswire.
news.summary: A significant proportion of participants achieved a specific remission threshold for Tardive Dyskinesia, independent of their underlying psychiatric disorder. This announcement was made at the 2025 Psychiatry Update Conference in San Diego. Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. revealed these findings, indicating a promising development in addressing Tardive Dyskinesia. Further details were disclosed at the conference, signaling potential advancements in this field.

news.headline: Bionova Scientific partners with Bionique Testing Laboratories for Mycoplasma Testing Services for Biologics Manufacturing.
news.summary: In Fremont, California and Saranac Lake, New York, on March 20, 2025, Bionova Scientific, a specialized biologics Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO), revealed a partnership with Bionique Testing Laboratories, a prominent Contract Research Organization (CRO). This collaboration aims to combine the expertise of these two companies in providing commercial-scale biologics services.

news.headline: Intelligent Bio Solutions (Nasdaq: INBS) to expand US IP portfolio with sixth patent grant for drug testing technology.
news.summary: Yesterday, in New York City, Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (Nasdaq: INBS) revealed plans to secure their sixth patent in the United States. This patent will further safeguard their innovative lateral flow technology crucial to the Intelligent Fingerprinting Drug Testing Solution. This move marks a significant development for the medical technology company known for its intelligent, swift, and non-intrusive testing methods. The patent will solidify their intellectual property rights as they continue to make strides in the industry.

news.headline: Suntera Fund Services partners with Tenor to enhance private credit loan administration, combining expertise and AI technology.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on March 20, 2025, Suntera Fund Services, a top provider of customized fund and loan administration services for private credit funds, has announced a collaboration with Tenor, an AI-driven platform that enhances private credit operations. This strategic partnership aims to leverage Tenor's technology to improve services for Suntera's clients.

news.headline: Universe Pharmaceuticals INC in China to consolidate 40 ordinary shares into 1, increasing their par value to US$11.25 each.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Universe Pharmaceuticals INC (NASDAQ: UPC) announced its plan to consolidate 40 ordinary shares, each with a par value of US$0.28125, into one ordinary share with a par value of US$11.25. This consolidation, known as the Share Consolidation, will merge every 40 pre-consolidation ordinary shares into one outstanding ordinary share. Shareholders do not need to take any action as this consolidation process will automatically combine the shares. Universe Pharmaceuticals is a pharmaceutical producer and distributor based in Jiangxi, China.

news.headline: Adeptia reports YOY double-digit growth in demand for intelligent data automation, simplifying integration at scale.
news.summary: A technology known as AI-powered intelligent data automation™ is enabling businesses to effectively utilize first-mile data™ by streamlining data integration across vital ecosystems, partners, and applications. This innovation is provided by Adeptia, a company specializing in intelligent data automation. The company is based in Chicago and announced this development on March 20, 2025, as per information obtained from PRNewswire. This advancement is facilitating seamless data integration for businesses, empowering them to harness the full potential of their data resources.

news.headline: Home Depot to present at J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Conference with CFO Richard McPhail, starting at 9:00am ET.
news.summary: Atlanta on March 20, 2025 - The Home Depot, recognized as the world's primary home improvement retailer, revealed that Richard McPhail, their executive vice president and CFO, is set to speak at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Conference. Scheduled to commence at 9:00 a.m. ET, the presentation will provide insights into the company's financial standing and strategies at the esteemed event.

news.headline: NewtekOne, Inc. finalizes private sale of senior unsecured notes, raising significant capital.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 8.2%, with approximately 12.3 million individuals now without a job. This spike in unemployment is attributed to the economic challenges faced during the pandemic. Additionally, the report highlights that the GDP has contracted by 4.6% in the last quarter, indicating a significant decline in economic growth. With restrictions still in place, many businesses have been unable to operate at full capacity, leading to widespread job losses. Experts suggest that government intervention and support for industries are crucial to stabilize the economy and reduce the unemployment rate.

news.headline: TOMI Environmental chosen by NASA for biosecurity operations using SteraMist iHP tech; expands into aerospace sector.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. introduced its SteraMist iHP technology at the NASA Johnson Space Center in Frederick, Maryland. TOMI, a prominent player in disinfection innovations derived from DARPA technology, is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol TOMZ. This move signifies TOMI's venture into the aerospace industry for the first time, showcasing their expertise in global disinfection and decontamination solutions.

news.headline: SR Bancorp, Inc. to pay initial quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share to shareholders on April 15, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, SR Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: SRBK), the parent company of Somerset Regal Bank, revealed the declaration of its first quarterly cash dividend. The announced dividend amounts to $0.05 per share and is scheduled to be disbursed on April 15...

news.headline: SubjectWell appoints Danielle Mann as VP of Legal and Compliance, effective March 20, 2025.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on March 20, 2025, SubjectWell, a company revolutionizing patient recruitment in clinical development, revealed the appointment of Danielle Mann as the Vice President of Legal and Compliance. Mann will bring her expertise to this role to tackle various challenges faced in the field.

news.headline: 374Water plans conference call for Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 27, 2025, at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: On Thursday, March 27, 2025, 374Water will be holding a conference call to discuss their fourth quarter and full-year results for 2024. The call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: NCCN guidelines now recommend non-endoscopic biomarker testing like Lucid's EsoGuard for esophageal precancer screening.
news.summary: A recent publication from a prominent society has endorsed the use of non-endoscopic biomarker testing as a viable substitute for endoscopy. This includes recommending Lucid's EsoGuard Esophageal DNA Test, emphasizing its effectiveness. The guidelines are a significant advancement in medical practice, providing patients with a less invasive option for esophageal testing. Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: LUCD), the company behind the test, has seen a rise in recognition following this endorsement. This shift signifies a move towards embracing alternative diagnostic methods, with potential implications for medical procedures and patient care.

news.headline: Yoshiharu updates Nasdaq on delisting notice regarding stockholders' equity.
news.summary: In a recent development, the country's economy grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The growth was primarily driven by a surge in consumer spending, which saw an increase of 6% compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, exports rose by 4.2%, contributing positively to the overall economic performance. Unemployment rate decreased to 4.3%, reaching a record low for the past decade. Analysts are optimistic about the future economic outlook, citing strong domestic demand and stable international trade as key factors. The government also announced a new stimulus package worth $15 billion to further boost economic growth and create more jobs. This package includes investments in infrastructure projects, tax cuts for small businesses, and subsidies for key industries. Experts believe that these measures will continue to drive the country's economy forward and maintain its position as a leading global player. Overall, the economic indicators point towards a robust and resilient economy, poised for further expansion in the coming months.

news.headline: Nokia launches FastMile Gateway 4, a 5G gateway with Wi-Fi 7 support for in-home high-speed connectivity.
news.summary: Nokia Corporation (NYSE:NOK) recently unveiled the FastMile Gateway 4, a compact 5G indoor gateway paired with Wi-Fi 7. This new product is aimed at delivering seamless high-speed connectivity across households. Key features of the gateway include high-gain antennas reaching up to 8 dBi and dual-band Wi-Fi 7, providing consumers with a self-installable solution. Supporting 4-carrier aggregation and up to 300MHz bandwidth, the gateway optimizes radio capacity, extends coverage, and increases throughput. The 5G Gateway 4 also incorporates 8RX and 3TX capabilities for enhanced spectrum efficiency and quicker speeds. Furthermore, Wi-Fi 7's multi-link operation (MLO) boosts performance by enabling devices to transmit simultaneously.
